name: claude-md-harness
description: Instruction-file harness for splitting CLAUDE.md or AGENTS.md into an OOP-style Root -> Module -> Leaf structure.

interface.shortDescription: Split project instruction files by directory.
interface.longDescription: Structure project instruction files such as CLAUDE.md and AGENTS.md as a layered Root -> Module -> Leaf harness, keeping global rules high-level and directory-specific rules close to the code.
defaultPrompt: Use $claude-md-harness to structure this project's CLAUDE.md or AGENTS.md files.
